final:
module decoder_4to16_with_enable(
    input  [3:0] data_in,
    input  enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);

always @(*) begin
    if (enable) begin
        data_out = 16'b0000_0000_0000_0000;
        data_out[data_in] = 1'b1;
    end else begin
        data_out = 16'b0000_0000_0000_0000;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
